name: I have a pre-existing back issue and fell off ladder at work, what now?
description: Claim aggravation; needs medical proof of worsening.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: I have a pre-existing back issue and fell off ladder at work, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Claim aggravation; needs medical proof of worsening.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description:
You can claim aggravation of pre-existing condition from the fall; workers' comp covers worsening.[1]

Medical experts distinguish new injury; independent exams may occur.[2]

- Get imaging showing change.
- Doctor opinion on aggravation.
- Avoid gaps in treatment.

Attorney fights denials based on priors; strong evidence key.[3]
